nasb.text: The Lord bless you from Zion, And may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life.

esv.text: The Lord bless you from Zion! May you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life!

cnv.text: 願耶和華從錫安賜福給你； 願你一生一世得見耶路撒冷的繁榮。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华从锡安山赐福给你！ 愿你一生一世都看见耶路撒冷兴旺！

csbs.text: 愿耶和华从锡安祝福你！ 愿你一生所有的日子， 都看到耶路撒冷的美福！
